name: Patty Spalding's Spaghetti Sauce (All Purpose)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and drain off the fat.
2. Add the cooked ground beef, tomato paste, tomato soup, tomato sauce, sugar, garlic (finely chopped), and Italian seasoning to a pot.
3. Pour in one can of water.
4. Stir everything together well.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook at low temperature for several hours.
6. It's best if prepared in a crockpot overnight.
7. To make a hot dog sauce, omit garlic and Italian seasoning, add more chopped onions, and 1 teaspoon of prepared mustard before serving.
